steps.title: Spot the contextual signal
steps.content: The sentence after the blank lists three different perspectives: the mother's, the father's, and the daughter's. Each section is from a different person — separate, individual viewpoints.

steps.title: Match to a synonym for "uncovered/identified"
steps.content:
The blank describes the three perspectives — the passage emphasizes they are different (mother, father, daughter — three separate viewpoints). The word must mean "different / separate." Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — unknown: unfamiliar; the perspectives are NAMED and described, not unknown. ✗
  • Choice B — unintended: not deliberate; the author chose these perspectives deliberately. ✗
  • Choice C — required: mandatory; the passage doesn't describe these as obligations. ✗
  • Choice D — distinct: clearly different or separate; matches three named perspectives from three different family members. ✓
That is the correct answer.
